scripts.dev: dotenv -e ../../.env.local -e .env.local -- node ../../scripts/validate-db-env.mjs dev && pnpm -C ../.. --filter @alusa/ui build && pnpm -C ../.. --filter @alusa/database build && pnpm -C ../.. --filter @alusa/lib build && pnpm -C ../.. --filter @alusa/finance build && dotenv -e ../../.env.local -e .env.local -- next dev
scripts.dev:raw: dotenv -e ../../.env.local -e .env.local -- node ../../scripts/validate-db-env.mjs dev && dotenv -e ../../.env.local -e .env.local -- next dev
scripts.dev:light: dotenv -e ../../.env.local -e .env.local -- node ../../scripts/validate-db-env.mjs dev && pnpm -C ../.. --filter @alusa/ui build && pnpm -C ../.. --filter @alusa/database build && pnpm -C ../.. --filter @alusa/lib build && pnpm -C ../.. --filter @alusa/finance build && dotenv -e ../../.env.local -e .env.local -- cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 NEXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 next dev -p 3000
scripts.dev:clean: dotenv -e ../../.env.local -e .env.local -- node ../../scripts/validate-db-env.mjs dev && rimraf .next && pnpm -C ../.. --filter @alusa/ui build && pnpm -C ../.. --filter @alusa/database build && pnpm -C ../.. --filter @alusa/lib build && pnpm -C ../.. --filter @alusa/finance build && dotenv -e ../../.env.local -e .env.local -- next dev
scripts.test:unit: dotenv -e ../../.env.test -- node ../../scripts/validate-db-env.mjs test && dotenv -e ../../.env.test -- vitest run
scripts.test:unit:watch: dotenv -e ../../.env.test -- node ../../scripts/validate-db-env.mjs test && dotenv -e ../../.env.test -- vitest watch
scripts.test:e2e: dotenv -e ../../.env.test -- node ../../scripts/validate-db-env.mjs test && dotenv -e ../../.env.test -- playwright test
scripts.test: dotenv -e ../../.env.test -- node ../../scripts/validate-db-env.mjs test && dotenv -e ../../.env.test -- vitest run
scripts.db:migrate:test: dotenv -e ../../.env.test -- node ../../scripts/validate-db-env.mjs test && dotenv -e ../../.env.test -- prisma migrate deploy --schema=../../prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:reset:test: dotenv -e ../../.env.test -- node ../../scripts/validate-db-env.mjs test && dotenv -e ../../.env.test -- prisma migrate reset --schema=../../prisma/schema.prisma --force --skip-seed
scripts.db:seed:test: dotenv -e ../../.env.test -- node ../../scripts/validate-db-env.mjs test && dotenv -e ../../.env.test -- prisma db seed --schema=../../prisma/schema.prisma
